description: This Java class defines the RefreshToken entity for handling refresh tokens within an authentication system, including fields such as token ID, associated user, token hash, expiration, revocation, and creation timestamps.

classes.name: RefreshToken
classes.description: Entity representing a refresh token stored in the database, with properties for token details and associations.

methods.name: RefreshToken
methods.description: Default constructor for the RefreshToken entity.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the refresh token.

methods.name: getRevokedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the token was revoked, if any.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID for the token.

methods.name: setUser
methods.description: Associates an AppUser with this token.
